name: CK Life OS - Voice Transcription Preflight

parameters.jsCode: const body = $json.body || $json; const provider = body.provider || 'local_whisper_or_pasted_transcript'; const approved = !!body.audio_source && !!body.privacy_level && (provider === 'local_whisper_or_pasted_transcript' || body.provider_approved === true) && !!body.approval_reference; return [{ json: { product: 'CK / Life OS', workflow_id: 'ck-life-os-voice-transcription-preflight', provider, approved, required: ['audio_source', 'privacy_level', 'provider_approved when non-local', 'approval_reference'], transcription_provider_called: false, external_send: false, transcript_created: false, rollback: 'Delete transcript draft and disable workflow; revoke provider credential if used later.' } }];

staticData.ck_life_os_boundary: disabled import; no live transcription or audio egress by default
